title: clerodendrum albiflos
intro: Clerodendrum albiflos, also known as the white flowered glory bower, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum albiflos include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
